---
# === Wyświetlane na stronie ===
title: "Robo AI Digest"

# === SEO - Meta tagi ===
pagetitle: "Robo AI Digest - AI News & Insights"

# === Ustawienia listingu (Natywne Quarto) ===
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: true
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero-banner}
::: {.rad-hero-prompt}
[\>_]{.rad-phosphor} connecting to digest...
[]{.rad-cursor-block}
:::

::: {.rad-hero-title}
ROBO·AI<br/>
[DIGEST_]{.rad-phosphor}
:::

::: {.rad-hero-sub}
Cutting-edge updates from the global AI frontier.<br/>
[// SIGNAL OVER NOISE]{.rad-mono-meta}
:::

::: {.rad-hero-stats}
[[ [262 ARTICLES]{.rad-bracket-inner} ]]{.rad-bracket}
[[ [20 SOURCES]{.rad-bracket-inner} ]]{.rad-bracket}
[[ [7 CATEGORIES]{.rad-bracket-inner} ]]{.rad-bracket}
[[ [UPDATED 08:00 UTC]{.rad-bracket-inner} ]]{.rad-bracket}
:::
:::

# Latest Updates
